# Custom Agents

This repository includes a workspace-specific custom agent for backend/API work.

## sensor-api

- File: `.github/agents/sensor-api.agent.md`
- Use when working on the Sensor.Api repository backend, especially C# ASP.NET Core API controllers, services, request/response models, and project structure.
- Focuses on small, focused edits, preserving existing controller/service patterns and avoiding broad refactors unless requested.
- Avoids introducing new dependencies without explicit approval.
- Adds or updates tests when behavior changes and an existing test pattern exists.
- Runs, builds, or tests only when relevant to the change.
